\tzpentry{ID5656}{Minimal Output with Meta Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5656 introduces Minimal Output with Meta Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \bar{V}_N = \frac{1}{N}\sum_{k=1}^N V_k \xrightarrow[N\to\infty]{\rm a.s.} \mathbb{E}[V]. \end{equation}
